Event: Cornucopia Island October 2025
Event Date: 16/10/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A256
Empty Doll

Triggers: 3 sec

Brand of Terror
The artifact's owner places a mark of darkness upon 4 random enemy units for 3 sec. The enemy units that have been marked are afflicted with fear for 3 sec., the damage they receive is increased by 35% for 3 sec., and they receive 400000 pure damage over 3 sec. When the mark expires, the targets are afflicted with silence. The ability's targets cannot use any abilities (except those granted by the equipped set) for 3 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
